productDisplayName: Jockey Men Comfort Stretch Black Bikini Brief
description: Composition Black bikini briefs made of combed cotton and elastane, with a double-layered front pouch, medium high leg and soft waistband with branding Fit Mid rise Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade Crafted from a perfect blend of premium combed cotton and elastane, this bikini brief from jockey fits excellently when worn just above the hip. The double-layered contoured front pouch gives maximum comfort and support while the new ultra soft waistband provides a super soft, smooth and comfortable grip.
